description_long: This object consists of a stack of four hardcover books, with the top book partially open to reveal its dark, glossy inner cover. The covers are a muted brown color with a subtle texture, and the edges of the pages are visible, showing a slightly aged, yellowed appearance. The top book's cover features faint gold embossed text, while the rest of the stack appears plain. The books are thick and sturdy, with a classic, vintage look suitable for a library or study. The spines are simple, with minimal decorative elements and no visible illustrations. The overall appearance suggests a collection of classic or antique volumes, possibly themed around horror stories.
description: A stack of four thick, brown hardcover books with a partially open top book and faint gold text on the cover. The books have a vintage, textured appearance and plain spines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stack of books with the top book slightly open and gold text visible on the cover.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the books and the open top cover, revealing the glossy inner surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back covers and the open top book, with no visible text or illustration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the open top book and the layered edges of the stacked books.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are brown with a subtle texture and minimal decorative elements. No visible text or illustrations are present on the spines.
